prediction.reasoning: For a 3-day prediction on AMZN, I applied a random walk model with historical volatility. AMZN typically exhibits daily volatility around 2-3%. Over 3 days, this compounds to roughly 3.5-4% standard deviation. The point estimate remains at current price following random walk assumption. Confidence intervals expand symmetrically using normal distribution: 50% CI covers ±2.5%, 80% CI covers ±4.2%, and 90% CI covers ±5.5% from current price.
